name: accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, inaccurate cash flow forecasts cause financial mismanagement. We automate weekly cash flow forecasts instead of manual cash flow tracking spreadsheets.
problem_solved: inaccurate cash flow forecasts leading to financial mismanagement
features: manual data entry for accounts receivable
basic visualization of cash flow trends
